seoTitle: Takilberan vs Talaroo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Takilberan and Talaroo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Takilberan and Talaroo.
heading: Takilberan vs Talaroo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Takilberan, Queensland and Talaroo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Talaroo has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Takilberan (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Takilberan or Talaroo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Takilberan has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Talaroo scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Takilberan scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Talaroo scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Takilberan or Talaroo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Talaroo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
